chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-485 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. 21.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Asstt. A. G a/w Niaz Muhammad Jakhrani, Mukhtiarkar Jacbabad. -.-.-.-.- Statements are filed on behalf of official respondents No.1 & 2, taken on record. Perusal of petition reveals that the petitioner has made multiple prayers which in our view is not tenable. As far as prayer clause regarding harassment is concerned, the official respondents present shall provide legal protection to the petitioner as and when he may approaches to them. As far as remaining prayers are concerned, counsel for the petitioner when confronted with legality of same, does not press it and submits that he shall file appropriate application before the forum having jurisdiction in accordance with law. The official respondents have no objection. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. Judge Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
